scripts.fix:tauri-binary: rm -f node_modules/.bin/tauri && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' > node_modules/.bin/tauri && cat node_modules/@tauri-apps/cli/tauri.js >> node_modules/.bin/tauri && chmod +x node_modules/.bin/tauri
scripts.fix:vite-binary: rm -f node_modules/.bin/vite && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' > node_modules/.bin/vite && cat node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js >> node_modules/.bin/vite && chmod +x node_modules/.bin/vite
scripts.fix:binaries: npm run fix:tauri-binary && npm run fix:vite-binary
scripts.fix:all-binaries: for bin in node_modules/.bin/*; do if [ -f "$bin" ]; then head -1 "$bin" | grep -q '^#!' && sed -i '1s|^.*$|#!/usr/bin/env node|' "$bin"; fi; done
